title: ozothamnus backhousei
intro: Ozothamnus backhousei, also known as the Swamp Ozothamnus, is a shrub native to Australia and New South Wales. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its medicinal properties have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin irritations, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Ozothamnus backhousei can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
